rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (proof `rfl`) causes simp to unfold `includeRight` to `Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight` bottom-up before the four characteristic lemmas (`counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, `map_includeRight`) can match, making them dead simp lemmas — a real, material api-design defect confirmed directly in the diff. Review 1 missed this entirely, so only acting on Review 2 improves the PR.
